name: BorderMind
short_description: Tired of playing fancy games that have lost all their mystery? Looking for something different? Look no further. Bordermind is a retro horror-themed FPS with a PSX/PS1 aesthetic. It takes the player into an intermediary world between the material and the spiritual.
detailed_description:
Bordermind is a horror-themed FPS with a unique retro style that captures the essence of the '90s and 2000s, both visually and structurally, delivering a one-of-a-kind experience with the spirit of classic games. Feel like you're playing on a PSX, PS1, or even classic Raycasting-era games—all at once, but with the smoothness and comfort of modern technology in a gameplay experience uniquely developed by us. No long tutorials, no overly complicated maps, no unnecessary fluff: here, the focus is on satisfying shootouts, within a captivating story and an intriguing plot twist.

🎮 Features:
• Retro aesthetic inspired by the 32-bit era and Raycasting
• Immersive, dark, and mysterious horror atmosphere
• Gameplay focused on fun and satisfaction
• Well-balanced jumpscares
• Carefully crafted by fans of classic shooters
• Perfect for those looking for something different – new, yet nostalgic

Story:

After the death of your wife, you realize you need to speak to her again. To do so, you seek out a device used during World War II to contact the dead and enter an intermediary world between the material and the spiritual.

You’ll have to face what comes from the darkness, deal with the remnants of fallen soldiers, confront your own fears, and find a way to go even deeper—until you reach your deceased wife.
